mapper.insert: insert into pptask (room_id, person_name, title, number, number_left, integral, status, create_time, expire_time) values (#{pt.roomId}, #{pt.personName}, #{pt.title}, #{pt.number}, #{pt.number}, #{pt.integral}, 1, now(), #{pt.expireTime})
mapper.select: select * from pptask_claim where task_id = #{taskId} order by claim_time desc
mapper.update: update pptask_claim set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
